title: celtis toka
intro: Celtis toka, also known as the Australian Celtis or Netted Hackberry, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea, belonging to the Celtis genus of deciduous trees. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Celtis toka include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Celtis toka can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and respiratory issues.
